线性规划
优化决策
优化决策型
线性规划 define decision variables first bind objective and constraints to data fields compare baseline and optimized plans
目标约束结构图 可行域/路径规划图 Pareto前沿图 调度甘特图 敏感性热力图
constraints not traceable objective and result table disconnected sensitivity analysis missing

统计评价
数据评价型

indicator meaning unclear weight source weak ranking interpretation unsupported
